title: Thirunelli Temple
tagline: Thirunelli Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Thirunelli Temple (also spelled Tirunelli) is an ancient temple dedicated to Maha Vishnu on the side of Brahmagiri hill in Kerala, India, near the border with Karnataka state.
overview.description: Thirunelli Temple (also spelled Tirunelli) is an ancient temple dedicated to Maha Vishnu on the side of Brahmagiri hill in Kerala, India, near the border with Karnataka state. The temple is classified one among the 108 Abhimana Kshethram of Vaishnavate tradition. The temple is at an altitude of about 900m in north Wayanad in a valley surrounded by mountains and forests. It is 32 km away from Manathavady.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pakshipathalam Bird Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Pakshipathalam Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary and a tourist location in Wayanad district of Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Appapara
topPlaces.description: Appapara or Appappara is a small village in Wayanad district of Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Irupu Falls
topPlaces.description: The Irupu Falls (also Iruppu Falls) are located in the Brahmagiri Range in the Kodagu district of Karnataka, India, bordering the Wayanad district of Kerala. It is a fresh water cascade and is situated at a distance of 48 km from Virajpet on the highway to Nagarhole.

topPlaces.name: Brahmagiri (Karnataka)
topPlaces.description: Brahmagiri is a mountain range in the Western Ghats of south India. It is situated on the border between Kodagu district in Karnataka state in the north and Wayanad district of Kerala state on the south.

topPlaces.name: Thrissilery Shiva Temple
topPlaces.description: Thrissilery Shiva Temple is a Shiva temple situated at Thrissilery neighbourhood in Wayanad, Kerala, India. This ancient temple is dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Kutta
topPlaces.description: Kutta is a small village in Ponnampet taluk of Kodagu, in Karnataka state of India. Location code number of Kutta is 618078.

topPlaces.name: Thrissilery
topPlaces.description: Thrissilery is a village in Wayanad district in the state of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thirunelli Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thirunelli Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thirunelli Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (80 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (83 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thirunelli Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thirunelli Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thirunelli Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thirunelli Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thirunelli Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pakshipathalam Bird Sanctuary, Appapara, Irupu Falls, Brahmagiri (Karnataka), Thrissilery Shiva Temple.
